original_snippet_context: Discussion of a government project presented to the Chamber of Deputies.
relevant_quote: o governo, na camara dos deputados, no dia 28 de ju- nho findo, apresentando um projecto sobre essa materia, que mereceu a approvação do legislativo.
justification: The text simply reports on the government presenting a project and its approval, without expressing any opinion on the specifics of the Caixa de Conversão or its proposed conversion rate.
